---
title: Organizing Data
execute:
 jupyter: math4025
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from plotnine import *
from pyhere import here
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, FunctionTransformer
from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer, make_column_selector
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from ratios import RatioGenerator
from sklearn.model_selection import GridSearchCV, RandomizedSearchCV, KFold, train_test_split, RepeatedKFold
from sklearn.base import BaseEstimator, TransformerMixin
from xgboost import XGBRegressor
```

```{python}
meta = pd.read_csv(here("data", "MIRION_meta_all_1.csv"), encoding='utf-8-sig')

meta=meta.set_index("YB")

phot = pd.read_csv(here("data/cleaned", "MIRION_phot_fluxes.csv"))
phot = phot.set_index("YB")

mirion_small = meta.join(phot, how="inner")
```

```{python}
## Contains flux data
spec_raw = pd.read_csv(here("data", "MIRION_spec_1.csv"), index_col=0, encoding='utf-8-sig')

spec = spec_raw.T.copy()
spec.index.name = "YB"
spec.columns = ["F8", "F12", "F24", "F70", "F160", "F250", "F350", "F500", "F870", "F1100"]
spec.index = pd.to_numeric(spec.index)
spec = spec.drop(columns = ["F8", "F12", "F24", "F70"])

mirion_big = mirion_small.join(spec, how="inner")
```

```{python}
print(len(mirion_big))
print(len(mirion_small))
```

```{python}
# print(mirion_big.head())
print(mirion_small.head())
```

```{python}
mirion_big.to_csv('../data/cleaned/MIRION_cleaned_all_fluxes.csv')
mirion_small.to_csv('../data/cleaned/MIRION_cleaned_low_fluxes.csv')
````
